description_long: This is a freestanding, industrial-style oven with a robust rectangular form and metallic finish. The front features a large black oven door with a prominent horizontal handle and a row of five round control knobs above it, likely for burner and oven settings. The cooktop has two heavy-duty cast iron grates and a side section that may serve as a grill or additional burner area. The sides are plain and metallic, while the rear panel displays a series of rectangular ventilation grilles and a small access panel, suggesting built-in cooling or exhaust. The oven stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, suitable for urban kitchens or commercial environments.
description: A metallic, freestanding oven with a large black door, five control knobs, and heavy-duty cooktop grates. The rear features ventilation grilles and a small access panel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the oven door, five round control knobs, and the main handle.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a plain metallic surface and the protruding oven handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays multiple rectangular ventilation grilles and a small access panel.
description_view_3: Right side view is similar to the left, with a plain metallic surface and the oven handle visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is located above the oven door and consists of five evenly spaced, round knobs. The knobs are arranged in a horizontal row and appear to be made of black plastic or coated metal. There are no visible digital displays, labels, or additional buttons. The design is minimalistic and functional.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a thick, horizontal bar mounted across the upper portion of the door. It protrudes outward, is cylindrical in shape, and appears to be made of dark-colored metal or plastic. The handle is ergonomically designed for a firm grip and is visually distinct from the door surface.
attribute_ventilation_features: The rear panel features multiple rectangular ventilation grilles arranged in a grid pattern, as well as a small square access panel in the lower right corner.
